MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S, Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Brenda Fiels.
Appearances:
Colin L. Pearce, Esq. for Plaintiff Marcus Lee, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff Oliver L. Holmes and against the defendant Benson Barbecues L.P. and Benson Barbecues USA, Inc.
Principal of $446.563.00
Interest of $149,867.41
Attorney's fees of $31,459.00
Costs of $477.00
For the total of $628,366,41
Judgment signed in open court.
No appearances, this matter is ordered off calendar.
